samples.text: All mammals are animals. A dog is a mammal. Therefore, is a dog an animal?
Every mammal belongs to the category of animals. A dog is classified as a mammal. Does this mean a dog is an animal?
All warm-blooded vertebrates are animals. A hound is a warm-blooded vertebrate. Therefore, is a hound an animal?
A dog belongs to the group of mammals. The group of mammals falls under animals. Based on this, is a dog an animal?
All mammals are animals. A dog is a mammal. The weather today is cloudy. Therefore, is a dog an animal?
